svg.title: Databricks ETL and RT streaming workflows
svg.desc: Two Databricks jobs: the ETL batch pipeline job 727296529764626 with five sequential tasks from Glue Crawler through Bronze Silver Gold and ML triggered by SNS or daily cron, and the RT streaming pipeline job 560379522229937 running every 5 minutes processing Kinesis ADT events through Bronze and Silver ADT notebooks.
svg.text: Databricks workflows — serverless compute · Unity Catalog
